candidatePool.description: Players from the daily HR model with at least one at-bat across their previous five completed games. The page defaults to at least three at-bats across the previous two games.

dailyProfile.interpretation: July 21 presents a Universal Day 20 with root 2 and Calendar Day root 3. Primary family 2-5-8 and secondary 3-6-9 highlight players whose birth data, jersey numbers, or personal cycles reduce to these roots.
